name: Bug report
about: Something doesn't work as expected
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug

## Description

A clear, concise description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include error output / stack traces (redact any keys).

## Environment

- Component: backend / frontend / pipeline / CI
- Python version:
- OS:
- Commit / version (`STATUS.yaml` → `version`):

## Additional context

Logs, screenshots, or anything else useful. **Never paste API keys or secrets.**
